arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Arne Slot names reason for red card controversy as fresh injury blow confirmed
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot was one of four people who got sent off following the Merseyside Derby and he has now spoken out about his red card, while also offering an injury update

arts.ttl: Liverpool injury latest as Arne Slot sweats on fitness of star ahead of Wolves
arts.sum: Liverpool face Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League on Sunday

arts.ttl: Peter Crouch’s net worth, podcast and comical love at first sight story in Liverpool
arts.sum: After retirement, former Stoke City and Liverpool striker Peter Crouch has continued to entertain his fans with funny stories and humorous takes through podcasts and as a pundit on TNT Sports

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits Goodison surprise as Liverpool boss sends 'mentality' message
arts.sum: Arne Slot lost his cool at the end of Liverpool's 2-2 draw with Everton in the final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: 'I can't promise' - Arne Slot explains Michael Oliver exchange and 'emotional' Liverpool response
arts.sum: Arne Slot admits he can't promise he'll walk away from another showdown after he was sent off after Liverpool's draw with Everton

arts.ttl: Arne Slot looked like a boy on a naughty step after misbehaving, writes LEWIS STEELE... his Merseyside Derby outburst offers an intriguing glance into a side of him not yet seen
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Arne Slot knows the punishment for his actions after the ill-tempered Merseyside Derby may be more severe than writing lines in detention

arts.ttl: The Big Question: Have Liverpool opened door to Arsenal in title race?
arts.sum: Last season, Liverpool entered April top of the league and in a strong position to fight for the title before winning just two of their next seven games as their challenge quickly fell away. Excluding teams who benefited from games in hand, only two sides have come back from deficits of more than five points to win the Premier League after 24 or more games: Manchester United in 1995/96 and Man City in 2011/12.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola says Liverpool can’t match Manchester City’s 100-point record
arts.sum: City achieved the historic haul as they clinched the first of Guardiola’s six Premier League titles in 2017-18.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery vents his anger following Liverpool decision
arts.sum: The Aston Villa boss has seen more changes to the Villans' schedule be made this week and the Premier League have refused to move their upcoming clash with Liverpool to a later date

arts.ttl: Liverpool keeping tabs on highly-rated 21-year-old who “ticks boxes”
arts.sum: Whether or not Liverpool go on to win the Premier League or Champions League titles at the end of the current campaign, Arne Slot will surely be looking at who can come in this summer to help improve his squad in certain areas.
